questions.question: 2 (a) The diameter of the Earth is 12 756 km. Write 12 756 km in metres. .............................................. m [1] (b) The distance from the Earth to the Moon is 384 000 km. Work out the time it would take a car travelling at 100 km/h to travel 384 000 km. Give your answer in days. ............................
